title: Kubernetes Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert — container and OS foundations, Kubernetes fundamentals and architecture, cluster setup, workloads and pods, configuration and secrets, services, ingress and Gateway API, storage, scheduling and resource management, control-plane and node internals, security and authorization, observability, application packaging, extending Kubernetes with CRDs and operators, stateful workloads, service mesh, GitOps and CI/CD, multi-cluster and hybrid, day-2 operations, performance and scalability, specialised workloads (AI/ML, batch, virtualization, edge), distributions and platform engineering, and certifications.

stages.title: Foundations & Prerequisites
stages.summary: Container, Linux/OS and networking concepts you need before learning Kubernetes.

nodes.title: Container Foundations
nodes.description: Containers, images, runtimes and registries used by Kubernetes.

nodes.title: Linux & OS Foundations
nodes.description: Linux kernel features (cgroups, namespaces) and shell basics.

nodes.title: Networking Foundations
nodes.description: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP and proxies that underpin Kubernetes networking.

stages.title: Kubernetes Fundamentals
stages.summary: What Kubernetes is, how it evolved and its high-level architecture.

nodes.title: What is Kubernetes?
nodes.description: Kubernetes definition, goals and ecosystem.

nodes.title: Kubernetes Evolution & Versions
nodes.description: History, release cadence and notable versions through v1.36.

nodes.title: Kubernetes Architecture Overview
nodes.description: Control plane, nodes, API server and the declarative model.

stages.title: Cluster Setup & First Steps
stages.summary: Spinning up clusters and accessing them with kubectl.

nodes.title: Local Development Clusters
nodes.description: Minikube, kind, k3d and Docker Desktop clusters.

nodes.title: Cluster Installation Tools
nodes.description: kubeadm, kops, kubespray and managed providers.

nodes.title: kubectl & Cluster Access
nodes.description: kubectl, kubeconfig, contexts and cluster discovery.

stages.title: Workloads & Pods
stages.summary: Pods, controllers and batch workloads.

nodes.title: Pod Fundamentals
nodes.description: Pod model, lifecycle, probes and lifecycle hooks.

nodes.title: Workload Controllers
nodes.description: Deployments, ReplicaSets, DaemonSets and StatefulSets.

nodes.title: Jobs & CronJobs
nodes.description: Run-to-completion and scheduled batch workloads.

stages.title: Configuration & Secrets
stages.summary: Configuring applications running on Kubernetes.

nodes.title: ConfigMaps
nodes.description: Storing and consuming non-sensitive configuration.

nodes.title: Secrets
nodes.description: Sensitive values, encryption at rest and external secrets.

nodes.title: Environment & Configuration Patterns
nodes.description: Env vars, downward API, args and config patterns.

stages.title: Services & Networking
stages.summary: How traffic flows in and around the cluster.

nodes.title: Services
nodes.description: ClusterIP, NodePort, LoadBalancer and headless services.

nodes.title: Ingress & Gateway API
nodes.description: HTTP routing with Ingress and the Gateway API (GA).

nodes.title: Network Policies
nodes.description: Cluster-internal segmentation and admin policies.

stages.title: Storage & Volumes
stages.summary: Persistent and ephemeral storage for workloads.

nodes.title: Volume Fundamentals
nodes.description: Volumes, volume types and projected volumes.

nodes.title: Persistent Volumes & Claims
nodes.description: PV/PVC binding, lifecycle and access modes.

nodes.title: StorageClasses & CSI
nodes.description: Dynamic provisioning, CSI drivers and snapshots.

stages.title: Scheduling & Resource Management
stages.summary: How pods are placed and how resources are governed.

nodes.title: Scheduling Fundamentals
nodes.description: kube-scheduler, predicates, priorities and scoring.

nodes.title: Resource Management
nodes.description: Requests, limits, QoS and resource quotas.

nodes.title: Advanced Scheduling
nodes.description: Affinity, taints, topology spread and custom schedulers.

stages.title: Control Plane & Cluster Internals
stages.summary: How the control plane and nodes actually work.

nodes.title: Control Plane Components
nodes.description: API server, controller manager, scheduler and cloud controllers.

nodes.title: Node & Kubelet Internals
nodes.description: kubelet, container runtime interface and kube-proxy.

nodes.title: etcd Internals
nodes.description: Cluster state, Raft, backup and restore for etcd.

stages.title: Security & Authorization
stages.summary: Authentication, authorization and pod-level security controls.

nodes.title: Authentication
nodes.description: Users, ServiceAccounts, tokens and OIDC.

nodes.title: Authorization & RBAC
nodes.description: RBAC, ABAC, webhook auth and admission control.

nodes.title: Pod Security & Admission
nodes.description: Pod Security Admission, policies and runtime hardening.

stages.title: Observability
stages.summary: Logs, metrics, traces and events for cluster and workloads.

nodes.title: Logging
nodes.description: Container logs, log shippers and aggregation.

nodes.title: Monitoring & Metrics
nodes.description: Metrics Server, Prometheus and dashboards.

nodes.title: Tracing & Events
nodes.description: OpenTelemetry, distributed tracing and Kubernetes Events.

stages.title: Application Lifecycle & Packaging
stages.summary: Packaging, releasing and rolling out applications.

nodes.title: Helm
nodes.description: Charts, releases, repositories and chart development.

nodes.title: Kustomize
nodes.description: Overlays, generators, patches and bases.

nodes.title: Deployment Strategies
nodes.description: Rolling, blue-green, canary and progressive delivery.

stages.title: Extending Kubernetes
stages.summary: Custom resources, operators and API extensions.

nodes.title: Custom Resources (CRDs)
nodes.description: CRDs, validation, conversion and versioning.

nodes.title: Operators & Controller Pattern
nodes.description: Reconciliation loops, frameworks and best practices.

nodes.title: API Server Extensions
nodes.description: Aggregated API servers, webhooks and CEL admission.

stages.title: Stateful Workloads
stages.summary: Running databases and stateful systems on Kubernetes.

nodes.title: StatefulSets In Depth
nodes.description: Identity, ordering, headless services and rolling updates.

nodes.title: Databases on Kubernetes
nodes.description: Operator-managed databases, message brokers and caches.

nodes.title: Backup & Restore
nodes.description: Velero, snapshots and application-aware backups.

stages.title: Service Mesh & Advanced Networking
stages.summary: Mesh, CNI internals and multi-cluster networking.

nodes.title: Service Mesh Fundamentals
nodes.description: Sidecar and sidecar-less meshes (Istio, Linkerd, Cilium).

nodes.title: CNI Deep Dive
nodes.description: CNI specification and major plugins (Calico, Cilium, Flannel).

nodes.title: Multi-Cluster Networking
nodes.description: Submariner, Cilium ClusterMesh and MCS API.

stages.title: GitOps & CI/CD
stages.summary: Continuous delivery patterns for Kubernetes.

nodes.title: GitOps Fundamentals
nodes.description: GitOps principles, repository patterns and OpenGitOps.

nodes.title: Argo CD & Argo Rollouts
nodes.description: Declarative deployments and progressive delivery with Argo.

nodes.title: Flux & Other Continuous Delivery
nodes.description: Flux, Jenkins X, Tekton and Spinnaker on Kubernetes.

stages.title: Multi-Cluster & Hybrid
stages.summary: Operating across many clusters, edges and regions.

nodes.title: Multi-Cluster Management
nodes.description: Cluster API, Karmada, Open Cluster Management and Rancher.

nodes.title: Federation & Fleet Management
nodes.description: KubeFed v2, fleet patterns and policy distribution.

nodes.title: Hybrid & Edge Clusters
nodes.description: KubeEdge, OpenYurt, virtual clusters and air-gapped setups.

stages.title: Cluster Operations: Day-2
stages.summary: Keeping clusters healthy in production.

nodes.title: Cluster Upgrades & Maintenance
nodes.description: Version skew, control-plane and node upgrades.

nodes.title: Disaster Recovery
nodes.description: etcd backups, cluster reconstruction and DR drills.

nodes.title: Troubleshooting & Debugging
nodes.description: Debugging pods, nodes, networking and the control plane.

stages.title: Performance & Scalability
stages.summary: Scaling clusters and workloads, and tuning for performance.

nodes.title: Cluster Scaling
nodes.description: Cluster Autoscaler, Karpenter and large-cluster limits.

nodes.title: Workload Autoscaling
nodes.description: HPA, VPA, KEDA and event-driven autoscaling.

nodes.title: Performance Tuning
nodes.description: Latency, throughput, kernel and runtime tuning.

stages.title: Specialized Workloads
stages.summary: Beyond stateless web apps: AI/ML, batch, edge and VMs.

nodes.title: AI/ML Workloads on Kubernetes
nodes.description: GPU scheduling, Kubeflow, KServe and inference platforms.

nodes.title: Batch & HPC Workloads
nodes.description: Volcano, Kueue, JobSet and queueing systems.

nodes.title: Edge, IoT & Virtualization
nodes.description: KubeVirt, Kata Containers, gVisor and Wasm workloads.

stages.title: Distributions & Platforms
stages.summary: Choosing a distribution and building internal platforms.

nodes.title: Managed Distributions
nodes.description: Cloud-managed Kubernetes options at a glance.

nodes.title: Self-Managed Distributions
nodes.description: OpenShift, Rancher, Tanzu, k3s, Talos and more.

nodes.title: Platform Engineering on Kubernetes
nodes.description: Internal developer platforms, Backstage and Crossplane.

stages.title: Certifications & Career
stages.summary: Certifications, exam preparation and career growth.

nodes.title: Kubernetes Certification Paths
nodes.description: KCNA, KCSA, CKAD, CKA, CKS and beyond.

nodes.title: Exam Preparation
nodes.description: Practice strategies, killer.sh and lab environments.

nodes.title: Career & Community
nodes.description: Roles, KubeCon, SIGs and contributing upstream.
